title: Cobblemon Empire
description: A custom Cobblemon network with ranks, triple-currency economy,  Jobs, custom dimensions, gyms, trading, and a full story mode.
body:
#  🌍 Cobblemon Empire

Where Trainers Become Legends

Cobblemon Empire is a custom Pokémon network built from the ground up using Cobblemon on Fabric, designed to feel like a living, breathing multiplayer Pokémon world inside Minecraft.

The network is split into two connected experiences, giving players both long-term progression and a full story adventure.

##  **🏰 Main World – Economy & Multiplayer Progression**
The main server is a persistent multiplayer world focused on community, progression, and building your legacy.

Players can:

- Catch and train hundreds of Pokémon
- Challenge gyms and powerful trainers
- Battle other players
- Choose jobs and max out the skill trees
- Trade on the global market
- Build towns, bases, and factions with friends
- Participate in events and tournaments

Everything is designed around fair gameplay and long-term achievement — no pay-to-win, just real progression.

## **📖 Rotating Story Mode – Currently: Kalos-Inspired Adventure**

Cobblemon Empire also features a full story mode server, offering a handcrafted campaign inspired by the Kalos region and the events of Pokémon X & Y.

In story mode, you can:
 
- Start fresh with your own party
- Travel through custom cities and routes, with custom spawns
- Challenge gym leaders, with exciting puzzles
- Battle rival trainers
- Progress through a structured narrative using NPCs and quests

When you finish (or anytime you choose), you can transfer your Pokémon party into the main server, allowing your adventure team to continue their journey in the multiplayer world.

## **👑 Imperial Rank System**

Rise through our unique progression hierarchy:

Citizen → Squire → Knight → Captain → Prince/Princess → King/Queen → Emperor

Each rank unlocks:
- Exclusive perks
- Reduced cooldowns
- Increased daily rewards
- Special bonuses for top-tier players

## **💰 Triple Economy System**

Our economy is fully player-driven and built around three currencies:

PokéGold – Main currency for trading, shops, and the GTS
Jewels – Premium currency for exclusive items.
Favour – Earned through voting to support the server and unlock rewards

## **🛒 Comprehensive Shop System**

Browse fully stocked shops including:

-  🧱 Building Blocks – Everything you need for construction
-  ⚪ Poké Balls – 27+ types including Apricorn balls
-  🌾 Farming Supplies – Seeds, crops, and food
-  ⛏️ Materials – Ores, gems, and crafting essentials

## **🌌 Custom Dimensions**

Explore five unique worlds:

🏛️ Spawn Dimension – Protected lobby and hub

🌍 Overworld – Permanent survival world

♻️ Resource World – Regularly refreshed

🔥 Nether

🐉 End

⚔️ Play Your Way

Whether you’re:

- A competitive battler climbing the rankings
- A shiny hunter chasing rare finds ✨
- A builder creating cities 🏗️
- Or a casual player enjoying the story 🧭

Cobblemon Empire offers a polished, social, and constantly evolving Pokémon experience built for both casual players and hardcore fans alike.
